title: Code view UX — Jobs view, streaming Q&A, markdown rendering

steps.description: Fix non-buffering Q&A streaming bridge in dashboard/routers/code_qa.py; add orch/jobs/aggregator.py (read-only union of code_index_jobs + doc_generation_jobs + batches + research project_docs); emit DaemonEvent(code_map_completed) on code index job completion
Review S01: streaming bridge non-buffering + wire-format preserved, aggregator correctness, DaemonEvent emission in-transaction with event_metadata attribute
Add dashboard/routers/jobs_ui.py with /jobs list, fragment, and detail routes; extend dashboard/routers/sse.py with code_map_completed=success toast; register jobs_ui router in dashboard/app.py
Review S03: route typing + error contracts, SSE toast map extension, router registration

Add DOMPurify CDN to base.html; wire sanitized markdown per-token in code_qa_panel.html; replace green banner in code_job_report.html with neutral Last-Run link; add Jobs link to nav_projects.html; create pages/project/jobs.html, pages/project/job_detail.html, fragments/jobs_table.html
Review S05: DOMPurify hook correctness, XSS vector handling, banner replacement, sidebar insertion, Jobs templates (list + fragment + detail) accessibility
Add unit + integration tests: streaming non-buffering, aggregator union/filter/sort/pagination/normalisation, Jobs API endpoints, markdown sanitization template wiring
Review S07: coverage, isolation, adherence to testing hard rules (no live DB, no DB mocking, testcontainers, psycopg v3 URL)
Global cross-agent review: end-to-end streaming path, toast pipeline, Jobs round-trip, consistency, no regressions
Apply fixes for CRITICAL/HIGH findings from S09; re-run quality + test gates

QV gates: ruff check, ruff format, mypy, unit tests, integration tests, route registration smoke-test, banner-text absence, plus Playwright CLI browser verification of sidebar Jobs link, Jobs list, Code page banner removal, Q&A streaming, and Job detail navigation
